description: The image shows a brightly lit, multi-lane expressway at night, with cars visible on the road. In the foreground, a man resembling Narendra Modi is pointing upwards. Text overlays indicate 'DELHI-DEHRADUN 6-LANE EXPRESSWAY OPENS'.
